prompt: Create a dark cinematic fantasy character portrait in a vertical 9:16 frame, showing the upper torso of a mysterious female rogue or vampire warrior named Nyx. She has very long, voluminous, wind-tousled black-purple hair with magenta streaks cascading over her shoulders and chest, with glossy strands and a slightly messy anime-inspired silhouette. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque square censor block in a muted mauve-brown gradient, covering the full facial area from forehead to chin while leaving the hair, neck, shoulders, and outfit visible. She wears a dramatic black leather gothic battle outfit: asymmetrical armored shoulder pieces, deep black leather bodice with angular cutouts, thin crossing chest straps, metal buckles, dark red fabric panels, and sharp silver accents. Around her neck is a black choker and layered straps holding a faceted purple crystal pendant in a silver diamond-shaped frame. The pose is front-facing and confident, cropped from the top of the hair to mid-chest, with the body slightly angled. Use moody studio lighting, soft rim highlights on the hair, realistic skin and leather textures, muted charcoal-gray background, high-detail semi-realistic fantasy game character art, elegant dark glamour, no text, no watermark.
